BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Manning於大約1400年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親John Manning37歲，母親Alice Walden31歲。他於1428年與Juliana Brockhill在英國英格蘭肯特堂結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年在英國肯特達哈姆享年37歲，埋葬在英國肯特達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Manning于大约1400年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲John Manning37岁，母亲Alice Walden31岁。他于1428年与Juliana Brockhill在英国英格兰肯特堂结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1436年在英国肯特達哈姆享年37岁，埋葬在英国肯特達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Manning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Mainnín ‘descendant of Mainnín’, probably an assimilated form of Mainchín, a diminutive of manach ‘monk’. This is the name of a chieftain family in Connacht. It is sometimes pronounced Ó Maingín and Anglicized as Mangan .
English: from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Manning.
North German and Dutch: habitational name from a farm so named, once in possession of a certain Manno (see Mann 2) and his kin.

variants.name: Mannen
meanings: Altered form of Irish or English   Manning  .

variants.name: Mannion
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Malachy, Brendan, Aislinn, Brigid, Ciaran, Declan, Dermot, Kieran, Liam, Maeve, Siobhan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mainnín (see Manning ).
English and Irish: variant of   Mangan  .

variants.name: Mangan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Declan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mongáin ‘descendant of Mongán’, a byname for someone with a luxuriant head of hair (from mong ‘hair, mane’).

variants.name: Mannings
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donovan, Eamonn, Ronan.
Irish: variant of Manning 1, with the addition of English excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Manning was born about 1400, in Kent, England, his father, John Manning, was 37 and his mother, Alice Walden, was 31. He married Juliana Brockhill in 1428, in Downe, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1436, in Cudham, Kent, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Cudham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Manning est né environ 1400, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Manning, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Walden, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Brockhill en 1428, à Downe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1436, à Cudham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Cudham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Manning um 1400 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Manning 37 und seine Mutter Alice Walden 31. Er hat 1428 in Downe, Kent, England, United Kingdom Juliana Brockhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1436 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Cudham, Kent, England und wurde in Cudham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Manning è nato il circa 1400 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, John Manning, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alice Walden, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Brockhill nel 1428, nel Downe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1436, nel Cudham, Kent, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Cudham, Kent, England.

ja.Cudham, Kent, England: イギリスケントクウドハム
ja.Downe, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントダウン
ja.lifeSummary: John Manningが約1400年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父John Manningは37歳，母Alice Waldenは31歳であった。1428年にイギリスイギリスケントダウンでJuliana Brockhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1436年にイギリスケントクウドハムで37歳で死去し，イギリスケントクウドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Manning(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Manning(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Walden(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 다운에서 Juliana Brockhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 영국 켄트 c드함에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 c드함에 묻혔다.

mn.Downe, Kent, England: Downe, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Manning nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Manning, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Walden, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Brockhill em 1428, em Downe, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1436, em Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Manning родился около 1400 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Manning было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Walden, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Brockhill в 1428 г. в местности доун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1436 г. в местности кудхам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности кудхам, кэнт, Англия.

sm.from about 1424 to 1434: mai le e tusa o le 1424 e o'o I le 1434

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Manning nació aproximadamente 1400, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Manning, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice Walden, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Juliana Brockhill en 1428, en Downe, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1436, en Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra.
